queryName: Role Definitions Allow Custom Subscription Role Creation
expectedValue: resource with type 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions' should not allow custom role creation
actualValue: resource with type 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions' allows custom role creation (actions set to '*' or 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write')
